zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Normanville於1256年出生在英國盧特藍德艾平加姆時，他的父親Lord Ralph Normanville37歲，母親Galliana Galina31歲。他於大約1280年與Dionisia Denise Lovetot在英國英格蘭肯特肯亞丁頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年11月12日在他的家鄉享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Normanville于1256年出生在英国盧特藍德艾平加姆时，他的父亲Lord Ralph Normanville37岁，母亲Galliana Galina31岁。他于大约1280年与Dionisia Denise Lovetot在英国英格兰肯特肯亞丁頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年11月12日在他的家乡享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Normanville was born in 1256, in Empingham, Rutland, England, his father, Lord Ralph Normanville, was 37 and his mother, Galliana Galina, was 31. He married Dionisia Denise Lovetot about 1280, in Kenardington, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 November 1282, in his hometown, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Normanville est né en 1256, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Lord Ralph Normanville, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Galliana Galina, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Dionisia Denise Lovetot environ 1280, à Kenardington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1282, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Normanville 1256 in Empingham, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Ralph Normanville 37 und seine Mutter Galliana Galina 31. Er hat um 1280 in Kenardington, Kent, England, United Kingdom Dionisia Denise Lovetot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. November 1282 im Alter von 26 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Normanville è nato il nel 1256 nel Empingham, Rutland, England, il suo padre, Lord Ralph Normanville, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Galliana Galina, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Dionisia Denise Lovetot circa 1280, nel Kenardington, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 novembre 1282, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Normanvilleが1256年にイギリスルトランドエンパンガムで生まれた時，父Lord Ralph Normanvilleは37歳，母Galliana Galinaは31歳であった。約1280年にイギリスイギリスケントケナルディントンでDionisia Denise Lovetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1282年11月12日に故郷で26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Normanville(이)가 1256년 영국 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Ralph Normanville(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Galliana Galina(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 켄아르딩턴에서 Dionisia Denise Lovetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 11월 12일 그의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Normanville nasceu em 1256, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Ralph Normanville, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Galliana Galina, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Dionisia Denise Lovetot aproximadamente 1280, em Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1282, em sua cidade natal, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Normanville родился в 1256 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Ralph Normanville было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Galliana Galina, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Dionisia Denise Lovetot около 1280 г. в местности кенардингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 ноября 1282 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 26 лет.

Se casó con Dionisia Denise Lovetot aproximadamente 1280, en Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1282, en su pueblo, a la edad de 26 años.
